title: Test and repair basic electrical circuits
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Test and repair basic electrical circuits demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to test basic electrical circuit

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for testing activity and select fault finding options according to workplace procedures1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with test and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for testing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for testing activity and select fault finding options according to workplace procedures1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with test and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for testing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for testing activity and select fault finding options according to workplace procedures1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues associated with test and repair activity, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures 1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for testing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to test basic electrical circuit

elements.title: Test circuit

pcs.text: Inspect extent of failure or damage to basic electrical circuit according to workplace procedures2.2 Test circuit according to workplace procedures and workplace health and safety requirements2.3 Identify cause of fault through analysis of test results.2.4 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect extent of failure or damage to basic electrical circuit according to workplace procedures2.2 Test circuit according to workplace procedures and workplace health and safety requirements2.3 Identify cause of fault through analysis of test results.2.4 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect extent of failure or damage to basic electrical circuit according to workplace procedures2.2 Test circuit according to workplace procedures and workplace health and safety requirements2.3 Identify cause of fault through analysis of test results.2.4 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Test circuit

elements.title: Repair circuit

pcs.text: Identify required information for repair activity3.2 Analyse repair options and select procedure according to workplace procedures. 3.3 Identify tools and equipment required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures3.4 Carry out repairs according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.5 Carry out post-repair testing according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify required information for repair activity3.2 Analyse repair options and select procedure according to workplace procedures. 3.3 Identify tools and equipment required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures3.4 Carry out repairs according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.5 Carry out post-repair testing according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify required information for repair activity3.2 Analyse repair options and select procedure according to workplace procedures. 3.3 Identify tools and equipment required for repair activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures3.4 Carry out repairs according to workplace and manufacturer procedures, manufacturer specifications, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.5 Carry out post-repair testing according to workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Repair circuit

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
